creator: Earsheltering
description: Hello dear surfers, this is JM Charcot, let me introduce you the 3patttes' online section, it is called Earsheltering, and there you will find sounds of artists to download and also some artwork in the archive. A kind of DIY cd, kust the way you like, you can also keep it on your hard drive. Those are virtual releases, for a faster proliferation. have a nice audio experience, this is JM Charcot, still yours. earRADIO earSradio1 : KKWNE radioshow earSradio 2 : KKWNE radioshow earSradio 3 : Anatomy of a maniac - Xanix - Radio edit earSradio4 : Night Of Horror earSradio 5 : Anatomy of a maniac - Minax - Radio edit earSradio 6 :  Netlabel Day 2024 VA "Tribute to Necktar": earS010 VA "NecktarVII": earS017 VA "Necktar 2017 vol1": earS036 VA "Necktar 2017 vol2": earS043 VA "Necktar 2017 vol3": earS051 VA "Necktar 2017 vol4": earS058 VA "Necktar 2017 vol5": earS066 VA "Necktar 2017 vol6": earS072 VA "Necktar 2017 vol7": earS078 VA "Necktar 2017 vol8": earS081 VA "Necktar 2017 vol9": earS086 PIKADON : earS095 Artist/Composer: Le Colibri Necrophile / Earsheltering / H.A.K.
